description:
Configuration for the demo service.

Application fields defined here compose with the framework-provided ones
(`port`, `environment`, `shutdown_timeout`, `name`, `version`); all of
them live at the top level of `config.toml` and can be overridden by
their environment variables.

database_url.description: Database connection URL; redacted in the startup readout. (env: DATABASE_URL)

environment.description: Deployment environment name, e.g. "development" or "production". (env: ENVIRONMENT)

name.description: Service name. Defaults to the Cargo package name. (env: SERVICE_NAME)

port.description: TCP port the server listens on. (env: PORT)

shutdown_timeout.description: Graceful shutdown grace period, in seconds. (env: SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT)

version.description: Service version. Defaults to the Cargo package version. (env: SERVICE_VERSION)

title: AppConfig
